caption: A man wearing a tall, silver-grey wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt with a bow tie, and suspenders is recorded in a podcast setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. Behind him is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks displaying apparel, including a "LEE" brand shirt. Two logos are visible on screen: one on the left featuring a microphone and the text "PODCAST" below "STUDIO", and one on the right that reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
